summary: V55.0 Cross-Cultural Neural Network Testing Complete. All 11 backend API tests pass (100%). OmniBridge endpoints verified: Lakota Sky (7 constellations), Cultural Map (17 bridges across 10 modules), Node Mythology (13 nodes with Lakota/Chakra/Element/Academy mappings), AI Insight generation (GPT-5.2). Volunteer system verified: locked users get gate=purchase_required, purchased users get 10 Credits/hr with φ-escrow. Frontend: Crystals page shows OmniBridge component in expanded items. Academy page requires login to show Interactive Masonry.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (OmniBridge verified on Crystals page, Academy page loads)

context_for_next_testing_agent: V55.0 Cross-Cultural Neural Network fully verified. NEW features working: 1) OmniBridge API - GET /api/omni-bridge/lakota-sky returns 7 Lakota constellations with teachings/geometry_link/ceremony. GET /api/omni-bridge/cultural-map returns 17 bridges across 10 modules (geometry, breathwork, meditation, crystals, oracle, herbology, economy, academy, music, nourishment). GET /api/omni-bridge/node-mythology/{0-12} returns node data with Lakota star, chakra, element, academy_module. POST /api/omni-bridge/insight generates cross-cultural AI insights using GPT-5.2. 2) Volunteer system - POST /api/sovereign/economy/volunteer/record: locked users (no $5 purchase) get gate=purchase_required, purchased users get gross_credits (10 Credits/hr), phi_escrow (1.618%), net_credits, fans_earned (10 Fans/hr). 3) Frontend - OmniBridge component (data-testid='omni-bridge') renders in InteractiveModule expanded items with 'Cross-Cultural Insight' button. Crystals page verified with 24 items and OmniBridge trigger. Academy page shows Interactive Masonry after login (requires auth).
